title: Bittersweet French Beetroot Stir-fry
description: A one-pot, low-fat-friendly French dish featuring bitter, dense beetroot enhanced with powdered sugar and a sweet marinade for added depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Beets
ingredients.notes: ensure they are bitter and dense

ingredients.name: Marinade
ingredients.amount: 2 tsp lemon juice, 1 tsp balsamic vinegar, salt and pepper to taste

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: such as olive oil or sesame oil

instructions: Peel and grate the beets, ensuring all pieces are similar in size for even cooking.
Mix powdered sugar into a marinade of lemon juice, balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add grated beets and cook until translucent.
Add the marinade to the pan, stir-frying gently until the liquid evaporates and the beets are coated with sweetness.
Serve hot as a side dish or garnish with fresh herbs for an extra touch of flavor.
